_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and implement data mining and data warehousing programs.
reference_document_element_description: Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, business glossary, and metadata management program, ensuring discoverability, lineage visibility, and classification currency.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.521), TF-T-007 (TF, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.575). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [develop, implement, mining, programs, warehousing] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, catalog, classification, currency, discoverability, ensuring] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.914, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.051 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Develop and implement data mining and data warehousing programs." and "Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, business glossary, and metad" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.525 < STS 0.575 (gap -0.050). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [develop, implement, mining] and [business, catalog, classification] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [develop, implement, mining, programs, warehousing]. WIDAI-only: [business, catalog, classification, currency, discoverability, ensuring].
